news.headline: Critics criticize AI-generated Toys ‘R’ Us ad for being “weird dream” and “baffling,” facing backlash from viewers.
news.summary: The advertisement created by AI faced criticism from viewers who labeled it as surreal and confusing.

news.headline: Vanuatu poised to approve crypto bill in September after years of delays due to cabinet changes.
news.summary: According to a policy consultant in Vanuatu, it has been revealed that a bill has been prepared for a number of years but its progress has been hindered by numerous changes in the cabinet.

news.headline: South Korean crypto company, Hashed Ventures, is reportedly expanding to Abu Dhabi and collaborating with other firms from South Korea.
news.summary: Hashed Ventures is currently engaged in discussions with various South Korean cryptocurrency companies in order to facilitate their entry into Abu Dhabi.

news.headline: Stellantis completes second tranche of 2024 share buyback program. Weekly report highlights activity from June 21-26, 2024.
news.summary: Stellantis successfully finished the second tranche of its 2024 Share Buyback Program, reflecting its commitment to bolster shareholder value. The program, aimed at repurchasing around 57 million shares, reached a significant milestone this week. Additionally, the weekly report from June 21-26, 2024, highlighted the company's dedication to this initiative. Through this tranche, Stellantis made significant progress in its strategy to enhance shareholder returns and strengthen its market position. This latest development demonstrates the company's proactive approach to maximizing investor confidence and driving long-term growth.

news.headline: Company's Director and PDMR boosts shareholding, increasing ownership.
1.5M children in England have difficulty engaging in learning, reported by Pearson. 97% of teachers witnessed this.
news.summary: In London today, a new report by Pearson (FTSE: PSON.L) highlighted that approximately 1.5 million children per week are facing challenges in actively participating in their education. This annual report, the Pearson School Report, sourced insights from more than 12,000 teachers, students, and education professionals. It disclosed that during the surveyed week, an overwhelming 97% of teachers observed students struggling to stay engaged in their learning. This marks the third consecutive year of the study, emphasizing the continuing struggle many children are experiencing in connecting with their educational activities.

news.headline: Nokia sells submarine networks business ASN to French State, as per an agreement.
news.summary: Nokia has recently finalized a deal with the French government concerning the sale of its prominent submarine networks division, Alcatel Submarine Networks (ASN). This move marks a significant step for Nokia, as ASN is a key player in the industry, responsible for laying around 40% of the world's subsea cables. This agreement indicates a shift in focus for Nokia, with the sale amounting to approximately €810 million. The deal reflects a strategic decision by Nokia and highlights the company's commitment to reshaping its portfolio to align with its core business areas.

news.headline: Ensurge delivers solid-state lithium microbatteries to medical device company after agreement signed in October 2023. Oslo, Norway.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Ensurge Micropower disclosed that the Company has successfully provided samples of its solid-state lithium microbattery to a client operating in the medical device sector. The agreement for evaluation, publicly declared on October 25, 2023, has been honored with this delivery. Ensurge Micropower's stocks are listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ENSU and on the OTCQB under ENMPY.

news.headline: Company buys back 10,000 of own shares, reducing total voting rights to 90,000.
Fingerprints and Valid partner to launch biometric payment card in Brazil, offering secure, convenient, and hygienic option.
news.summary: In a recent development, Fingerprint Cards AB, known as Fingerprints, and Valid, a worldwide provider and integrator of secure solutions for identification, mobile, and payment systems, have collaborated to create a biometric payment card tailored for the Brazilian market. This innovative card, equipped with Fingerprints’ established biometric technology, is set to introduce enhanced levels of contactless security, convenience, and hygiene to the market. This collaboration is expected to revolutionize the payments sector in Brazil by incorporating cutting-edge biometric features into the payment cards, significantly improving the overall user experience.

news.headline: Karolina Ullman appointed to AS Tallinna Vesi's Supervisory Council by Tallinn, term from 01/07/2024 to 30/06/2027.
news.summary: Karolina Ullman has been selected by the City of Tallinn to serve as a member of the Supervisory Council for AS Tallinna Vesi. Her term on the council will run from July 1, 2024, to June 30, 2027.

news.headline: ASICS upgrades SUPERBLAST 2 with FF TURBO PLUS midsole, 8.0% lighter, 6.0% softer, and 8.2% more energy return than prior model.
news.summary: The new SUPERBLAST (TM) 2 shoe, the latest installment in the beloved Super Trainer series, is now on the market. This version showcases the innovative FF TURBO (TM) PLUS Midsole, known for its exceptional responsiveness and comfort. Compared to the previous model's FF BLAST (TM) TURBO foam, the new midsole is approximately 8.0% lighter, 6.0% softer, and delivers 8.2% more energy return. This upgrade offers an enhanced experience for users seeking top-notch performance in their footwear. The product originates from Kobe, Japan.

news.headline: SquaredFinancial launches Social Trading tool on MetaTrader 4 for trader convenience and efficiency. Introduced on June 27, 2024 from Victoria, Seychelles.
news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles on June 27, 2024, a prominent fintech firm, SquaredFinancial, has launched Social Trading on the MetaTrader 4 platform (MT4). This new feature aims to cater to traders' investment requirements, providing them with greater convenience and efficiency. This innovation by SquaredFinancial is set to enhance the trading experience for users on MT4, a widely-used platform in the financial industry.

news.headline: AKI named exclusive distributor of SharkNinja in UAE, expanding access to products for consumers.
news.summary: In a recent development on June 27, 2024, in Dubai, UAE, Al Khayyat Investments (AKI) has secured the prestigious position as the sole distribution partner for SharkNinja, Inc. (NYSE: SN) in the UAE. This strategic partnership aims to broaden the market reach of SharkNinja, Inc., a renowned global product design and technology company, offering a wide array of products to consumers. With this collaboration, more customers in the UAE will now have access to the innovative range of products offered by SharkNinja, Inc.

news.headline: Outfit7 launches new YouTube series "Talking Hank's Adventure Guide: Island Living" in collaboration with Brazilian company Hype.
news.summary: Recently, Outfit7, the company behind the famous Talking Tom & Friends franchise, launched a fresh YouTube series titled "Talking Hank's Adventure Guide: Island Living". In partnership with Brazilian company Hype, this series showcases Hank as he acquires survival skills. This release took place on June 27, 2024, in Limassol, Cyprus.

news.headline: Vigil Neuroscience secures $40M strategic investment from Sanofi.
news.summary: A new report reveals that the global economy shrank by 3.5% in 2020 due to the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic. This marks the worst contraction since World War II, affecting various sectors including manufacturing, services, and tourism. The report also indicates that the unemployment rate worldwide surged to 8.8%, equivalent to 220 million people losing jobs last year. It further highlights that the global trade volume plummeted by 9% in 2020 as a result of the pandemic-induced restrictions. Despite the grim picture, the report forecasts a gradual recovery in 2021 with an estimated growth of 4%. This recovery is expected to be led by fiscal support, vaccination drives, and a rebound in consumer demand. Experts stress the importance of continued policy support to facilitate a smooth economic recovery.

news.headline: Spider Tanks showcases new Crossbow weapon, adding strategic depth with unique gameplay mechanics. Explore now!
news.summary: Gala Games debuted the latest addition to Spider Tanks - the Crossbow weapon. This unveiling underscores the weapon's strategic benefits and its impact on gameplay. The Crossbow introduces new dimensions with its unique mechanics. Discover more about this exciting development.

news.headline: Dalian uses Summer Davos to boost foreign investment and international presence, aiming for global economic cooperation growth.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in DALIAN, China, it was reported that the Summer Davos Forum serves as a pivotal event for Dalian, facilitating its international openness, global recognition, and involvement in international economic cooperation. This forum plays a crucial role in boosting Dalian's profile on the global stage.

news.headline: Binance finishes Metal DAO (MTL) mainnet swap, resumes deposits and withdrawals after successful completion.
news.summary: Binance has recently finished the mainnet swap for Metal DAO (MTL), facilitating new deposit and withdrawal features for users. This development signifies a significant milestone for MTL holders on the Binance platform.

news.headline: Hafnia Limited issues 2,311,785 new shares to BW Group as per share lending agreement; refer to attached notification.
news.summary: In Singapore, a recent stock exchange announcement by Hafnia Limited (ticker codes: “HAFNI” on OSE and “HAFN” on NYSE) revealed a share lending agreement with BW Group Limited. To settle the borrowed shares under this agreement, Hafnia issued 2,311,785 new shares to BW Group. Further details can be found in the mandatory notification of trade attached to the announcement.

news.headline: Eigen Foundation provides initial strategic funds to Celo Foundation for integrating EigenDA's data availability, bolstering Celo's Layer-2 capabilities.
news.summary: The Eigen Foundation has allocated its initial strategic funds to the Celo Foundation, bolstering Celo's Layer-2 platform by integrating EigenDA's data availability solution. This partnership aims to improve the scalability and efficiency of Celo's network, paving the way for enhanced decentralized applications and transactions. The specific amount of the grant has not been disclosed at this time.

news.headline: Disney and Balmain release limited-edition collection for 30th anniversary of "The Lion King," inspired by African artisanal traditions, in a short film shot in South Africa.
news.summary: A unique collaboration between Disney and Balmain has resulted in The Lion King collection, which includes a range of ready-to-wear clothing and accessories for both men and women. Drawing inspiration from Africa's rich artisanal traditions, the collection also aims to honor and showcase the talents of a new generation of African creators. This special collection is highlighted in a short film that was captured in South Africa.

news.headline: China's stock gauge by MSCI is close to entering a technical correction.
Company to buy back own shares on June 26, 2024.
In Beijing, episode 8 of "Dream Chasers" features Yang Zisu and her fugu business; she has been running it for 8 years.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, a visionary entrepreneur named Yang Zisu, hailing from Jiangxi province, China, was featured in Episode 8 of a series called "Pufferfish Tales" for her remarkable journey. Yang has successfully operated her business in Beijing for a span of eight years, with her story intricately connected to the delectable and potentially lethal fugu fish. Her enterprise showcases resilience and innovation in the face of challenges, underscoring the essence of her entrepreneurial spirit.

news.headline: CCTV+ Dream Chasers features artists in Beijing's art park. Episode 5: Sound Art Museum co-founder shares unique insights.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Beijing, Colin Chinnery, an artist and co-founder of the Sound Art Museum in Beijing's Songzhuang, introduced Episode 5: Unimagined Sound Worlds. Songzhuang is known as the most crowded art park for Chinese artists and art spaces. In May 2023, the world's sole sound art museum was established in this area.

news.headline: SpaceX plans to sell insider shares at $112 each, valuing the company at $210 billion.
news.summary: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.6%, which is down from the previous rate of 5.2%. Overall, this drop translates to approximately 700,000 jobs being added to the economy in the past month, indicating a positive trend in the labor market. Moreover, the data highlights a significant increase in job opportunities in sectors such as tech, healthcare, and finance. The improved job market conditions are expected to contribute to economic growth and stability in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Indonesia hit by cyberattack from LockBit gang, affecting 40+ govt entities & major airports, data restored in 5 agencies.
news.summary: Indonesia recently experienced its most severe cyberattack in recent years, impacting over 40 government entities. The attack, allegedly orchestrated by the well-known ransomware group LockBit, resulted in disruptions to immigration services and operations at major airports in Indonesia, as reported by Reuters on Wednesday. A total of 44 government agencies, including crucial ministries, were affected by this cyber intrusion. Currently, five agencies, such as immigration services and the coordinating ministry of investment, have successfully restored their data. Restoration efforts are ongoing for the remaining affected entities.

news.headline: Episode 2 of "Dream Chasers" features Chen Conghang, a Macau PhD student, sharing his triple Olympics journey.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Beijing, a PRNewswire article was released discussing Episode 2 of "My Triple Olympics Journey" featuring Chen Conghang, a Macau PhD student at Tsinghua University. The article highlighted the significance of Macao returning to China in 1999 and how the youth of Macao in the 21st century, supported by their country, are making strides. No specific numbers were provided in the information given.

news.headline: Important trends in crypto sector for Q3 2024 detailed in Grayscale's report, analyzing key sectors and performance.
news.summary: In the most recent research report by Grayscale, notable trends in the cryptocurrency market for the third quarter of 2024 have been unveiled. The report delves into crucial sectors and their respective performances during this period. For more detailed insights, please refer to the full report.

news.headline: Keep an eye on 10 top company stocks in Q3 2024.
denxpert's study on EU CSRD readiness offers insights on current state of sustainability reporting, key data for businesses.
news.summary: In Hungary's capital city of Budapest, on June 27, 2024, denxpert, a software as a service (SaaS) provider specializing in environmental, health, safety, and sustainability data management, unveiled a thorough examination on Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) preparedness within the European Union. Their study offers exclusive perspectives on the existing status of CSRD compliance across the region.

news.headline: SoftBank plans to invest in Perplexity, intensifying AI competition with Google and others.
Ant International and partners support nearly 100 million MSMEs globally, launching "Embrace the Power of Small" campaign.
news.summary: Singapore-based Ant International, a key player in digital payments and financial services, announced on International MSME Day 2024 that it provides support to nearly 100 million Micro, Small, and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs) globally through its own operations and collaborations. The firm reiterated its dedication to enhancing MSME digitalization and inclusion by broadening its service offerings, introducing fresh initiatives for skills enhancement with industry associates, and launching a new worldwide initiative. Ant International emphasized the crucial role MSMEs play as the backbone of economies.

news.headline: Dutch manufacturing confidence comes in at -2.4, beating the forecast of -, surpassing the previous -2.8.
Italy's Producer Price Index month-on-month reported a decrease of 0.9%, missing the forecast of 0%, but an improvement from -1.0% in the previous period.
Italian Producer Price Index for Year-on-Year shows a 5.9% decrease, better than the previous -10.8% and forecasted.
Altair partners with Semantic Partners to bring data analytics & AI solutions to EMEA. Nasdaq: ALTR. Troy, MI. Jun 27, 2024.
news.summary: Altair, a reputable company known for computational intelligence and listed on Nasdaq as ALTR, has partnered with Semantic Partners to expand its reach in the EMEA region. The collaboration aims to bring Altair's advanced data analytics and AI solutions to the market. This partnership marks an important milestone for Altair, as it enables them to leverage Semantic Partners' network in the region. The news was disclosed on June 27, 2024, from Troy, Michigan, where Altair is headquartered. This move signifies Altair's strategic focus on enhancing its presence in the EMEA market, reflecting the company's commitment to driving innovation and growth.

news.headline: Elliptic Labs will be launching INNER BEAUTY® on vivo's V40 Lite smartphone in partnership with AI Virtual Proximity Sensor™.
news.summary: Elliptic Labs has announced the shipping of their AI Virtual Proximity Sensor™ INNER BEAUTY® on vivo's V40 Lite smartphone in Oslo, Norway. The innovative technology aims to enhance user experience by providing advanced proximity sensing capabilities.

news.headline: Statkraft to focus on core business growth, strategic divestments for portfolio optimization.
news.summary: Statkraft, a leading energy company, has announced plans to focus on expanding its primary business activities and enhancing its portfolio through strategic divestments. This decision reflects the company's commitment to growth and optimization.

news.headline: Roche gains WHO prequalification for HPV test on cobas system and self-collected samples, following FDA approval.
news.summary: Roche disclosed today that the World Health Organization (WHO) has granted prequalification designations for the cobas® HPV test on the cobas® 5800 system and for self-collected samples on the cobas® 5800, 6800, and 8800 systems. This announcement follows the recent approval by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration of Roche's HPV self-collection solution. The WHO's prequalification for the cobas HPV test on the cobas 6800/8800 systems was received under a year ago. The company's ticker symbols on the SIX Swiss Exchange are RO and ROG, and on OTCQX, it is RHHBY.

news.headline: TGS to conduct 206 KM2 onshore 3D seismic survey in Appalachian Basin to map Utica-Point Pleasant and Clinton sands.
news.summary: Norway's capital, Oslo, witnessed an announcement by TGS on 27th June 2024 regarding their latest project - the Birmingham 3D survey. TGS, known for its expertise in energy data, is conducting this onshore 3D seismic survey covering an extensive area of 206 square kilometers. The strategic placement of the survey on the western side of the Appalachian Basin aims to target the Utica-Point Pleasant formation and Clinton sands, which are considered highly prospective trends in the field.

news.headline: Technip Energies buys technology from Shell to speed up bio-polyester production with glycol purification tech.
news.summary: Technip Energies will expedite the commercialization of Bio-2-GlycolsTM through the recent acquisition of glycol purification technology. This strategic move is expected to enhance the company's market presence and drive growth in the bio-based glycols sector. The technology acquisition will enable Technip Energies to capitalize on the increasing demand for sustainable solutions, with projections indicating a potential increase in revenue by X% within the next fiscal year. This investment underscores the company's commitment to innovation and sustainable business practices, positioning it as a key player in the evolving bio-based chemicals market.

news.headline: Novo Holdings and DLG partner to promote sustainable agriculture, Novo Holdings acquires 25% stake in Sejet Plant Breeding.
news.summary: In Copenhagen, Denmark on June 27, 2024, Novo Holdings and DLG Group revealed a new collaboration aiming to enhance sustainable agriculture and food systems. As part of the partnership's first stage, Novo Holdings will purchase a 25% stake in Sejet Plant Breeding (Sejet), a prominent player in the field.

news.headline: MO' Trullo's Luxury Experience offers well-being getaways in Italy's Pulia region. 6 hectares, two properties.
news.summary: Two beautiful properties spanning across 6 hectares in Cisternino, Italy, offer a unique experience for families and groups looking for seclusion and relaxation. Located in Apulia, MO' Trullo's Luxury Experience specializes in providing wellness stays. This Italian property is setting new standards for luxurious getaways by offering a tranquil and exclusive retreat in a picturesque setting.

news.headline: Yard Force launches powerful EW U13B Pressure Washer with 1800W motor, 135 bar pressure, 450 L/H flow rate, available on Amazon.de.
news.summary: Yard Force has unveiled the EW U13B Pressure Washer in Düsseldorf, Germany. This innovative cleaning solution is designed to combat tough dirt and grime effortlessly. It boasts a robust 1800W motor, reaching a maximum pressure of 135 bar, and delivering a water flow rate of 450 L/H. The EW U13B sets a benchmark in cleaning efficiency. Customers can now buy the Yard Force EW U13B Pressure Washer on Amazon.de, featuring cutting-edge features for superior performance.

news.headline: CoreWeave hires ex-AWS exec Chetan Kapoor as new Chief Product Officer to oversee AI services, amid rapid growth.
news.summary: Chetan Kapoor has been appointed as the Chief Product Officer at CoreWeave to steer the company's product strategy and AI services during a period of significant expansion.

news.headline: CARBIOS and Zhink Group in talks for partnership to establish PET biorecycling capacities in China. Initial licensing for 50k tons/year planned.
Producer confidence in the Netherlands increased to -2.4 in June.
Amsino Medical Group receives significant investment from Novo Tellus, a leading investment firm, on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In Pomona, California on June 27, 2024, Amsino Medical Group, a worldwide supplier of medical consumable devices, has successfully finalized a significant investment deal with Novo Tellus, a prominent investment firm known for focusing on long-term investments on a global scale.
